payload.author: claude
payload.body: Distribution mechanics confirmed against current Claude Code docs (2026-06): (1) ZERO-INSTALL — .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md in a project auto-loads for anyone who clones; trust new (RT-94) should scaffold it. (2) PERSONAL — copy to ~/.claude/skills/<name>/; hot-reloads, no restart. (3) PLUGIN — bundle as trust-plugin/{.claude-plugin/plugin.json, skills/<name>/SKILL.md}; the Trust repo itself can host the marketplace via .claude-plugin/marketplace.json at repo root; users: /plugin marketplace add briannadoubt/Trust then /plugin install trust@<marketplace-name>. Skills namespace as /trust:writing-trust. Set version in plugin.json so users update only on bumps. Dev/test loop: claude --plugin-dir ./trust-plugin (overrides installed copy); claude plugin validate before submitting to the community marketplace (platform.claude.com/plugins/submit). Plugins can also bundle hooks (e.g. nudge cargo build -> cargo trust build) + agents + MCP. Docs: code.claude.com/docs/en/skills.md, plugins.md, plugin-marketplaces.md.
